title: Expose authenticated raw link payload RX API before SCHC decompression
description: Why this exists: lichen_link_rx() currently parses/authenticates a frame and immediately SCHC-decompresses to IPv6, so lichen_l2_input() never sees authenticated inner payload bytes, peer pubkey/EUI, link epoch/seq, or a chance to dispatch raw routing controls. What needs to be done: add a production API or result type that returns authenticated inner payload bytes plus immediate-neighbor metadata after signature/MIC/source validation and replay commit, preserving existing IPv6 lichen_link_rx() behavior for callers. Include native_sim tests that preserve existing SCHC IPv6 RX behavior.
notes: Implementation 2026-07-02: added Zephyr C lichen_link_rx_payload() API returning authenticated inner L2 payload bytes plus immediate-neighbor metadata before SCHC decompression; preserved lichen_link_rx() as SCHC/IPv6 compatibility path. Replay allocation/commit now happens only after authentication and caller-specific acceptance; raw payload API stages payload/info/out_len internally and publishes them only after replay success. Replay covers signed frames and AES-CCM encrypted unsigned frames; CRC-only insecure fallback remains non-replay-committed. Added link_crypto tests for authenticated SCHC raw payload, authenticated routing/control 0x15 payload, lichen_link_rx() rejecting routing dispatch with -EPROTONOSUPPORT, tamper rejection, replay sharing across raw/IPv6 paths, no replay commit on small output buffer, encrypted unsigned replay rejection, replay failure not publishing payload/info/out_len, and large signed+encrypted protected payload with inner payload <= LICHEN_MAX_PAYLOAD. Local check: git diff --check passed. EC2 Zephyr builder i-0875d1ad33af5db66 in us-east-2a with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr; clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ct4d. Twister command: west twister -T lichen/tests/link_crypto -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-ct4d --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ct4d/lichen. Final result: 2/2 configs passed, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 skipped, 0 warnings in 18.25s; 20 total test cases. JSON details: native_sim net.lichen.link_crypto passed, execution_time 0.02, 10 cases; qemu_x86 passed, execution_time 1.18, 10 cases; Twister memory fields not populated. Code reviews: initial reviewers 019f2526-7e57 and 019f2526-7ea4 found P2 stack/test gaps and P1 encrypted-unsigned replay bypass; fixed. Second reviewers 019f252c-16c4 and 019f252c-1716 found P1 protected-payload size regression, P2 replay allocation side effect, and P3 stale docs; fixed. Third reviewers 019f252f-8c8c and 019f252f-8ccd found one P2 raw API published payload before replay success; fixed. Final reviewers 019f2533-1fd6 and 019f2533-2029 reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Residual non-blocking note: lichen_link_rx() may write out_ipv6 before replay error, but API does not promise output unchanged on error and callers must gate on return code. EC2 cleanup pending before final handoff.
close_reason: Completed: authenticated raw link payload RX API implemented with SCHC compatibility preserved; EC2 Twister link_crypto passed on native_sim and qemu_x86; final two code reviews reported no P0/P1/P2 findings.
